title: [Zrenigotham House, Master]
description: A winding staircase leads to the master chamber, where tall windows offer a moonlit view of the orchard, its trees silvered under the night sky.  Soft shadows stretch across the room, cast by the pale glow drifting over a great carved modwir bed upon an expansive rug of lush miniver, its outline gentle in the dim light.  Modwir nightstands stand quiet gaurd, each bearing an elegant glass lamp.  A brass sidetable holding a white porcelain basin rests near mahogany-framed mirror.
room.location: Zrenigotham House, inside the frontier town of Wehnimer's Landing
